candidates.why: A component of current liabilities, not the total.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Non-current, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: This appears in the current liabilities section before total current liabilities, so it is the clean current borrowings total and preferred for STD.
Current debt component; useful only if no clean current total exists.
Current debt component; useful only if no clean current total exists.
Current maturity component, likely overlaps with current portion of long-term borrowings.
Lease liabilities should be excluded from baseline STD.
Lease liabilities should be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current-section total 'Borrowings' and excluded lease-related rows. Did not add 'Current portion of long-term borrowings' or 'Short term loans' to avoid double counting because they likely roll into current borrowings.

candidates.why: Direct current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line in the current liabilities section.
Tax asset, not payable.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected current tax liability line as taxes payable. This label was outside the shortlist but is clearly correct.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet PPE line; appears to represent net PP&E and is preferable to cash-flow capex lines or intangible asset lines.

candidates.row_label: Investments in property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow disposal, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Not PPE.
Not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total Indefinite-lived Intangible Assets (excl Goodwill) - Net - Supplemental
candidates.why: Not PPE.
Not PPE stock.
Not PPE stock.

variables.notes: No exact total net PPE line is reported with values. 'Other property, plant and equipment' is the best balance-sheet PPE stock measure available and is selected confidently.
